name: hostinger-coolify-production-guide
title: Hostinger Coolify Production Guide
version_notes: Initial first-party Hostinger VPS plus Coolify production guide with agent-safe repository-preparation skill.

outputs.notes: Published skill README generated from project-owned curated AI output.
Published skill entrypoint generated from project-owned curated AI output.
OpenAI platform metadata generated from project-owned curated AI output.
Full Hostinger VPS plus Coolify production guide copied from first-party source into the copyable skill folder.
Skill-local reference index generated from reviewed curated output.

skill_creation_review.existing_skill_review: Reviewed current skills before adding hostinger-coolify-production-guide: n8n-local-setup for setup-guide structure and full-reference publishing, self-hosted-service-safety for non-n8n self-hosting safety boundaries, secure-cicd-installer for deployment-adjacent approval gates, ai-coding-agent-rules routing, README skill tables, and the skill safety matrix. The new hostinger-coolify-production-guide skill is distinct because it pairs a full human-owned Hostinger/Coolify production runbook with a narrow agent-safe repository-preparation workflow.
skill_creation_review.trigger: Use hostinger-coolify-production-guide when a user asks to prepare a repository for Hostinger VPS plus Coolify production deployment, review Docker/Coolify readiness, or access the local human-owned zero-to-production guide. Do not invoke it for ordinary app coding with no deployment concern, n8n-specific deployments, generic self-hosted risk review without Coolify, or live production actions without explicit approval.
skill_creation_review.decision_reason: Extending self-hosted-service-safety would blur its compact review-only purpose, while extending n8n-local-setup would mix non-n8n production deployment guidance into an n8n-specific skill. A new module keeps the full guide source-fidelity surface and production safety boundary explicit.
skill_creation_review.unique_value: Combines a complete Hostinger VPS plus Coolify zero-to-production guide with a strict agent-safe repo-preparation contract that prevents agents from owning billing, DNS, secrets, deployment, migrations, backups, cutover, or rollback.
skill_creation_review.runtime_footprint: SKILL.md stays concise and routes to a local reference only when full runbook detail matters. The long runtime guide is published as a reference file, not duplicated in the default entrypoint.
skill_creation_review.local_assets: Full local reference guide, concise skill README, SKILL.md, OpenAI metadata, and a skill-local reference index. No executable tools or templates are bundled because examples are copy-safe placeholders inside the guide.
skill_creation_review.output_contract: Return a production-readiness report with app inventory, agent-safe repo changes, human-owned Hostinger/Coolify/DNS/secrets/deploy/migration/backup/cutover/rollback actions, validation, blockers, and confirmation that no real secrets or live production actions were added or performed.
skill_creation_review.anti_bloat_review: The skill is not generic DevOps advice: it triggers only for Hostinger VPS plus Coolify production readiness and routes long instructions to a local reference. It is excluded from ordinary feature work and from live production operations without approval.
skill_creation_review.safety_boundary: Agent-safe by default for local repository inspection and placeholder-only documentation/config examples. Hostinger, Coolify, GitHub connection, DNS/TLS, real secrets, production deployments, migrations, backups, restore tests, cutover, rollback, VPS changes, billing, customer data, and destructive actions are human-owned and approval-gated.
skill_creation_review.third_party_audit: not_applicable_first_party; no third-party text or code copied or adapted. Vendor docs were consulted only as factual context.
skill_creation_review.publisher_workflow: context-preserving-ai-publisher source-to-surface workflow with first-party _main source, deterministic copy outputs, curated reference index, routing updates, safety matrix updates, sync, and validation.
skill_creation_review.routing: hostinger-coolify-production-guide is routed for Hostinger VPS plus Coolify production repository-preparation, Docker/Coolify readiness, and local runbook tasks. It is not routed for generic self-hosting risk review or live production mutation.

project.name: Hostinger Coolify Production Guide
project.summary: First-party Hostinger VPS plus Coolify zero-to-production guide with a concise agent-safe repository-preparation skill.

skill.summary: Prepare repositories for human-owned Hostinger VPS plus Coolify production deployments.
